= Verified Interface Seams

This directory contains the verified interface layer for idrisiser, following
the hyperpolymath ABI-FFI universal standard.

== Structure

* **abi/** — Idris2 ABI definitions (The Spec).  Formal proofs of interface
  correctness using dependent types.
* **ffi/** — Zig FFI implementation (The Bridge).  C-ABI exports that
  implement the functions declared in the Idris2 ABI layer.
* **generated/** — Auto-generated C headers (The Result).  Produced from
  proven Idris2 ABI definitions for consumption by downstream code.

== Data Flow

----
abi/Foreign.idr  →  declares FFI functions with type-safe signatures
                         ↕  (must match exactly)
ffi/src/main.zig →  implements those functions as C-ABI exports
                         ↓
generated/abi/   →  C headers derived from the proven ABI
----
